recommendations.title: Playing with Fire
recommendations.overview: A crew of rugged firefighters meet their match when attempting to rescue three rambunctious kids.

recommendations.title: Christmas...Again?!
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Fantasy, TV Movie, Drama
recommendations.overview: Rowena "Ro" is a high-spirited 11-year-old hoping to add more spunk to her Christmas celebrations when her parents’ divorce is going anything but smoothly.

recommendations.title: Race to Witch Mountain
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction, Thriller, Action
recommendations.overview: A taxi driver gets more than he bargained for when he picks up two teen runaways. Not only does the pair possess supernatural powers, but they're also trying desperately to escape people who have made them their targets.

recommendations.title: The Game Plan

recommendations.title: You Again
recommendations.overview: History -- make that high school -- may repeat itself when Marni learns that Joanna, the mean girl from her past, is set to be her sister-in-law. Before the wedding bells toll, Marni must show her brother that a tiger doesn't change its stripes. On M

recommendations.title: Parental Guidance
recommendations.overview: Artie and Diane agree to look after their three grandkids when their type-A helicopter parents need to leave town for work. Problems arise when the kids' 21st-century behavior collides with Artie and Diane's old-school methods.

recommendations.title: One True Loves
recommendations.overview: Emma and Jesse are living the perfect life together, until Jesse disappears in a tragic helicopter crash on their first wedding anniversary. Four years later, Emma has found happiness again and is about to marry her best friend when Jesse resurfaces,

recommendations.title: She's the Man
recommendations.overview: Viola Hastings is in a real jam. Complications threaten her scheme to pose as her twin brother, Sebastian, and take his place at a new boarding school. She falls in love with her handsome roommate, Duke, who loves beautiful Olivia, who has fallen for

recommendations.title: Don't Tell a Soul
recommendations.overview: Two thieving teenage brothers, stealing money to help their sick mom, match wits with a troubled security guard stuck at the bottom of a forgotten well.

recommendations.title: The Godfather Part II
recommendations.overview: In the continuing saga of the Corleone crime family, a young Vito Corleone grows up in Sicily and in 1910s New York. In the 1950s, Michael Corleone attempts to expand the family business into Las Vegas, Hollywood and Cuba.
